messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	n = payload['page']
	self.custom.currentPage = n

# implement your handler here
	##format into devices, make any notes
	try:
		rows = payload['rows']
		selectedTenant = payload['tenantName']
		selectedTenantID = payload['tenantID']
		selectedDeviceProfileID = payload['deviceProfileID']
		deviceProfileList = payload['deviceProfileList']
		selectedUseCase = payload['selectedUseCase']
		selectedApp = payload['selectedApp']
		selectedAppID = payload['selectedAppID']
		tagProvider = payload['tagProvider']
		formattedDevices = device.bulkuploadV2.processFile(rows, deviceProfileList, selectedTenant, selectedApp, selectedUseCase, selectedTenantID, selectedDeviceProfileID, selectedAppID, tagProvider )
		#system.perspective.sendMessage("setFormattedDevices", payload={"formattedDevices":formattedDevices})
	
		
		system.perspective.print("send payload")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("navigate", payload={"page":"BulkUploads/components/preview"})
		self.getChild("EmbeddedView").props.params.formattedDevices = formattedDevices
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print("process file error {0}".format(str(e)))
